name: eduflow-hub
description: Netlify-ready EduFlow Hub with Google login, profile dashboard, admin panel, Netlify Blobs, and Gmail broadcast emails.

scripts.build: echo 'Static site - no build step required'
scripts.check: node --check js/main.js && node --check js/profile.js && node --check js/admin.js && find netlify/functions -name '*.js' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
